title: Infinite Foods Revamped
description:
This Mod Revamps My Other Mod Called Infinite Beef
With New Items, Blocks, ... that's is pretty much it tho
body:
Please, Just Download The Mod









Fine

Infinite Items is A mod that adds a lot of new foods and blocks 

Foods:
Adds Infinite Beef, Infinite Carrot(s), Infinite Bread, and Infinite Potato(s),

oh yeah and also infinite poisonous potato that gives you no hunger so they are useless

Blocks:
adds a new Heavy Gold Block Which Gives you slowness to walk on (don't ask why. I don't know)
also new infinity Block And When you right-click on it it gives you 5 XP levels and an Egap*


*Enchanted Golden Apple

That Is All So Have A Nice Day Ya'll
